name: Guard Ghost
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>背</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guard Ghost" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guard Ghost" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Guard Ghost" once per turn.

action: Returns itself to hand while banished
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
